title: Broadcom Erased $320 Billion Overnight — AI Chips Just Got Complicated
script: Broadcom just erased $320 billion in market value in a single day — one of the biggest wipeouts in tech history. After Q2 earnings, CEO Hock Tan refused to raise the company's $100 billion AI chip target for the year. Q3 guidance came in at $16 billion, $1.2 billion short of Wall Street's estimate. The stock fell 15%, dragging Micron down 7% and ARM down 4%. Good enough is no longer good enough for AI chips.
